description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden desk with a natural wood grain finish, featuring a broad work surface and a raised back shelf for additional storage or display. The front of the desk is equipped with six drawers, three on each side, each with a small round metallic knob for easy access. At the center, there is a single-door cabinet with a transparent or frosted glass panel and a lock, providing secure storage for important items. The sides of the desk are solid panels with a subtle curve, adding a touch of elegance to the otherwise functional design. The back of the desk is a plain wooden panel, and the top shelf is supported by two angled side supports. The overall construction appears sturdy, making it suitable for both professional and home environments.
description: A sturdy wooden desk with six drawers, a central glass-fronted cabinet, and a raised back shelf, all finished in a natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with knobs and a central glass-panel cabinet door with a lock.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid wood panel and the curved profile of the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain wooden back panel and the raised shelf structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a solid wood panel and curved profile.
attribute_orientation: The side with drawers and the central glass-panel cabinet is intended to face the user, with the raised shelf at the back and solid panels on the sides.
